mapper.select: select (select count(1) from project_info p where p.is_deleted = 0 and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ))) as project_count, (select count(1) from project_info p where p.is_deleted = 0 and p.status in ('IN_PROGRESS', 'MONITORING') and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ))) as in_progress_project_count, (select count(1) from project_task t inner join project_info p on p.id = t.project_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where t.is_deleted = 0 and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ))) as task_total, (select count(1) from project_task t inner join project_info p on p.id = t.project_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where t.is_deleted = 0 and t.status = 'DONE' and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ))) as task_completed, (select case when count(1) = 0 then 0 else round(sum(case when t.status = 'DONE' then 1 else 0 end) * 100.0 / count(1), 2) end from project_task t inner join project_info p on p.id = t.project_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where t.is_deleted = 0 and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ))) as task_completion_rate, (select coalesce(sum(p.planned_budget), 0) from project_info p where p.is_deleted = 0 and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ))) as planned_cost, (select coalesce(sum(p.actual_cost), 0) from project_info p where p.is_deleted = 0 and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ))) as actual_cost, (select count(1) from risk_register r inner join project_info p on p.id = r.project_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where r.is_deleted = 0 and r.status <> 'CLOSED' and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ))) as open_risk_count, (select count(1) from change_request c inner join project_info p on p.id = c.project_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where c.is_deleted = 0 and c.status in ('SUBMITTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW') and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' ))) as pending_change_count

select m.id, m.name, m.description, m.planned_date, m.actual_date, m.status, m.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name from milestone m left join sys_user u on u.id = m.owner_id inner join project_info p on p.id = m.project_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where m.is_deleted = 0 and (p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm where pm.project_id = p.id and pm.user_id = #{userId} and pm.member_status = 'ACTIVE' )) order by case when m.planned_date is null then 1 else 0 end, m.planned_date asc, m.id desc limit 5
